##NAMES=Manganbabingtonite
##RRUFFID=R140743
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=Ca_2_Mn^2+^Fe^3+^Si_5_O_14_(OH)
##LOCALITY=Iron Cap mine, Aravaipa District, Graham County, Arizona, USA
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Rock Currier
##DESCRIPTION=Short prismatic dark-greenish crystals, associated with small needle hedenbergite crystals.
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R140743
##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=(Ca_1.94_Mn^2+^_0.06_)(Mn^2+^_0.82_Fe^2+^_0.16_Mg_0.02_)(Fe^3+^_0.98_Al_0.02_)(Si_4.99_Al_0.01_)O_14_(OH)
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated

##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
